results.title: FLAT-LLM (2025/5)
results.reason: FLAT-LLM head-wise PCA low-rank truncation operationally overlaps with structured low-rank panel compression; functional score meets 0.7 threshold.

results.title: DFloat11 Lossless (2025/4)
results.reason: Byte-level lossless float compression; lossless aspect overlaps thematically but not the tessellated single-DOF mechanism; below all thresholds.

results.title: ZipServ (2026/3)
results.reason: Hardware-aware lossless representation; no kinematic single-DOF constraint, no exact content-word phrase matches, below thresholds.

results.title: Compression Laws for LLMs (2025/4)
results.reason: Empirical scaling-law analysis of compression vs accuracy; no mechanism overlap with tessellated rigid panels, all scores below threshold.

results.title: Modular Representation Compression (2026/4)
results.reason: Modular representation compression with structured panels operationally captures tessellated-panel reorganization; functional score 0.72 meets threshold.

fail_reason: Two functional hits (FLAT-LLM at 0.70 structured low-rank compression, Modular Representation Compression at 0.72 modular tessellated panels) meet the func>=0.7 threshold, indicating the candidate's structured low-rank panel reorganization concept is functionally covered by existing LLM compression literature.
